mapper.select: SELECT buff_id, user_id, buff_type, name, stat_type, effect_pct, expires_at, created_at FROM buffs WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND ( expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW() ) ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO buffs (user_id, buff_type, name, stat_type, effect_pct, expires_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{buffType}, #{name}, #{statType}, #{effectPct}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT buff_id, user_id, buff_type, name, stat_type, effect_pct, expires_at, created_at FROM buffs WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (stat_type = #{statType} OR stat_type = 'ALL') AND ( expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW() )
SELECT buff_id, user_id, buff_type, name, stat_type, effect_pct, expires_at, created_at, linked_quest_id AS linkedQuestId, progress FROM buffs WHERE buff_id = #{buffId}

SELECT buff_id, user_id, buff_type, name, stat_type, effect_pct, expires_at, created_at, linked_quest_id AS linkedQuestId, progress FROM buffs WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND buff_type = 'DEBUFF' AND stat_type IN ('STR', 'INT', 'WIL', 'VIT')
mapper.update: UPDATE buffs SET linked_quest_id = #{questId}, progress = 0 WHERE buff_id = #{buffId}

UPDATE buffs b SET progress = 0 WHERE b.buff_type = 'DEBUFF' AND b.linked_quest_id IS NOT NULL AND b.progress > 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM quest_logs ql WHERE ql.quest_id = b.linked_quest_id AND DATE(ql.completed_at) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO buffs (user_id, buff_type, name, stat_type, effect_pct, linked_quest_id, progress) VALUES (#{userId}, 'DEBUFF', #{name}, #{statType}, #{effectPct}, NULL, 0)
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM buffs
WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND buff_type='BUFF' AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at <= NOW()
